title: Vegan Cassava Flatbread with Roasted Rosy and Chewy
description: A delicious and crispy flatbread topped with roasted rosy and chewy, perfect for a vegan snack. This recipe combines the nutty flavor of cassava with the earthy taste of the toppings.
instructions: Mix the grated cassava with 1/2 cup water to create a dough.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes pliable.
Divide the dough into 4 equal pieces and roll out each piece into a thin circle.
Brush the flatbreads with egyptian olive oil.
Bake the flatbreads in the oven for 10-12 minutes or until crispy.
Toss the rosy and chewy with 1 tbsp egyptian olive oil and roast in the oven for 5-7 minutes or until tender.
Assemble the flatbreads by topping each piece with roasted rosy and chewy.
